labels.analysis: The MCP Server is designed to enhance problem-solving capabilities through systematic thinking and mental models. Its tools focus on structured reasoning, collaborative analysis, and methodical inquiry. Key functionalities include applying mental models, debugging approaches, decision frameworks, and metacognitive monitoring. The server also supports session management for tracking and exporting reasoning processes. It is predominantly a tool for cognitive enhancement, logical analysis, and structured thinking rather than specific domain operations.
labels.reasoning: The primary label "Decision Support" captures the server's core functionality of aiding structured decision-making and problem-solving. Secondary labels "Collaborative Tools" and "Cognitive Enhancement" reflect its ability to facilitate group reasoning and improve thinking processes. A custom label is added to highlight its niche as a "Structured Reasoning Assistant" due to its unique focus on systematic thinking methodologies.

tools.name: sequentialthinking
tools.description: Process sequential thoughts with branching, revision, and memory management capabilities

nextThoughtNeeded.description: Whether the next thought is needed

isRevision.description: Whether this is a revision of a previous thought

tools.name: mentalmodel
tools.description: Apply mental models to analyze problems systematically

tools.name: debuggingapproach
tools.description: Apply systematic debugging approaches to identify and resolve issues

issue.description: Description of the issue being debugged

tools.name: collaborativereasoning
tools.description: Facilitate collaborative reasoning with multiple perspectives and personas

tools.name: decisionframework
tools.description: Apply structured decision-making frameworks

tools.name: metacognitivemonitoring
tools.description: Monitor and assess thinking processes and knowledge

tools.name: socraticmethod
tools.description: Guide inquiry through systematic questioning

claim.description: The main claim or topic being explored

tools.name: creativethinking
tools.description: Engage in creative and lateral thinking approaches

tools.name: systemsthinking
tools.description: Analyze complex systems and their interactions

tools.name: scientificmethod
tools.description: Apply scientific method for systematic inquiry

tools.name: structuredargumentation
tools.description: Construct and analyze structured arguments

tools.name: visualreasoning
tools.description: Process visual reasoning and diagram operations

tools.name: session_info
tools.description: Get information about the current session including statistics and recent activity

tools.name: session_export
tools.description: Export the entire session state for backup or sharing

tools.name: session_import
tools.description: Import a previously exported session state

sessionData.description: JSON string of exported session data

merge.description: Whether to merge with existing session data (default: false)
